title: Tomlinson, Michael - Minister for Countering Illegal Migration, Home Office - ACOBA advice
body: "Mr Tomlinson left his role at the Home Office in July 2024 and at the Attorney General’s Office in December 2023.  Non-Executive Member of the Board, Poole Harbour Commissioners  Mr Tomlinson sought the Committee’s advice about taking up a role with Poole Harbour Commissioners.  The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in November 2024; and the appointment was taken up later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
